overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a trench coat exploring a dimly lit stone cottage interior with supernatural green fireplace, then exiting into a foggy night forest and walking along a winding path through dense pine trees toward distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone cottage interior with green-flamed fireplace

events.description: character turns from facing NPC and begins walking toward the exit door
character opens wooden door and steps outside into foggy forest

agents.ego_description: standing in the cottage interior facing an NPC, then turning and walking toward the exit door

notable_agents.action: standing near the wooden bed facing the ego character

entered.detail: stone fireplace with green supernatural flames and marble bust on mantel
simple wooden bed with white sheets against stone wall
rough gray stone block walls with wooden ceiling beams
heavy dark wooden door with metal hinges and frame
multi-paned window showing dark blue night sky
wooden desk with papers and lit candle
green and gold decorative wall hanging

segments.scene_description: Inside a stone cottage, the character stands facing an NPC near a bed, with a supernatural green-flamed fireplace and marble bust visible in the background. The character then turns and walks toward a heavy wooden door, exiting the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy pine forest path near stone building

events.description: exits stone cottage into foggy outdoor forest environment with immediate visibility of exterior wall and lantern
moves away from building light into darker forest interior as cottage disappears from view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through dense foggy forest away from the building

entered.detail: exterior stone wall of the cottage just exited with lit window
single lit lantern on wooden post illuminating the path
tall dense pine trees lining both sides of the narrow path
narrow winding dirt trail leading into the foggy woods

segments.scene_description: Having exited the cottage, the character walks along a narrow dirt path through dense foggy forest. The stone building and a lantern post are initially visible to the left but fade into the fog as the character moves deeper into the dark pine woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail opening toward mountain vista

events.description: tree canopy opens slightly revealing more night sky and distant mountain silhouette

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path as the terrain gradually opens up toward a distant clearing

entered.detail: dark mountain silhouette visible through breaking clouds on the horizon
large moss-covered rock formation beside the path
dark blue cloudy night sky visible through tree canopy gaps

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the forest as the dense tree canopy opens slightly, revealing the night sky and distant mountains ahead. The path winds past rocky outcrops and the forest gradually transitions toward a more open clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic interior of a mystical cottage into the expansive, foggy depths of a nocturnal forest. It begins inside a stone room where the character stands near a bed and a green-flamed fireplace before turning to exit through a heavy wooden door. As the character steps outside, the scene shifts to a narrow dirt path where the stone building and a lantern post quickly fade into a dense, enveloping fog. The camera then follows the character deeper into the dark pine woods, moving past rocky outcrops as the oppressive tree canopy gradually opens. Finally, the forest thins into a clearing, revealing a glimpse of the night sky and distant mountains ahead.
